title: magnolia × jigongshanensis
intro: Magnolia × jigongshanensis is a hybrid plant species, resulting from the cross between Magnolia denudata and Magnolia liliiflora. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are derived from its alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Magnolia × jigongshanensis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or extracts, which are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and health.
